name: fractal-explorer

scripts.dist: npm run build && npx @neutralinojs/neu build --embed-resources && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync('Release')) fs.rmSync('Release', {recursive:true, force:true}); fs.mkdirSync('Release', {recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync('dist/fractal-explorer/fractal-explorer-win_x64.exe', 'Release/FractalExplorer.exe');"

description: Fractal Graphics Explorer - Koch Snowflake, Minkowski Island, Sierpinski Triangle & Carpet rendered with WebGL
